texto: ...I take as a point of departure the possibility and desirability of a fundamentally different form of society--call it communism, if you will--in which men and women, freed from the pressures of scarcity and from the insecurity of everyday existence under capitalism, shape their own lives. Collectively they decide who, how, when, and what shall be produced.
explicacao: Citação de Michael Burawoy sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “...I take as a point of departure the possibility and desirability of a fundamentally different f…” articula reflexao, capitalism, collective em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como collective e communism.
